content.claim: Multigrade and mixed-age teaching models in Chile (Puentes Educativos) and Norway show quality potential when supported by deliberate teacher training, cross-school networks, and professional learning communities, but these are non-Hungarian systems.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Portuguese system reform lens
limitations: Requires specific infrastructure (training, networks, materials) not confirmed to exist in Hungary
Cannot be assumed as a default outcome of keeping small schools open without deliberate investment
Transfer to Hungarian institutional context not tested
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
